overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a cowboy traversing a snowy mountain trail. The character rides a horse through deep snow for the first portion, then dismounts to lead the horse on foot, illuminated by moonlight and a handheld lantern.

events.description: character dismounts from horse and begins leading it on foot through deep snow

agents.ego_description: riding horseback through deep snow on a narrow mountain trail, navigating between snow-covered pines

entered.detail: narrow winding path through deep snow with visible hoof prints
dense snow-laden evergreen trees lining the trail
dense snow-laden evergreen trees lining the trail
steep snow-dusted rock face rising beside the trail
bright moon visible through scattered clouds providing ambient light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on horseback traversing a narrow snowy mountain trail at night. The path winds through dense pine forests flanked by rocky cliffs, illuminated by moonlight and the warm glow of a lantern. The horse moves steadily through deep snow until the character dismounts at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain forest trail with open vistas

agents.ego_description: leading the horse by its reins, walking through deep snow on the mountain trail

notable_agents.action: horse walking alongside the character, being led by the reins through deep snow

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered peaks becoming visible as the trail curves and opens up

segments.scene_description: Now on foot, the character leads the horse along the snowy trail. The camera follows from behind as they navigate the winding path, with the rocky terrain shifting from the right to the left side of the frame. The trail occasionally opens to reveal expansive views of distant snow-covered mountain ranges under the moonlit sky, while the lantern casts long shadows on the pristine snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit mountain trail that transitions from a mounted journey to a slow trek on foot. It begins by following a rider on horseback as they wind through dense pine forests and rocky cliffs, guided by the warm glow of a lantern. As the character dismounts, the perspective shifts to a walking pace, leading the horse further along the snowy path while the rocky terrain migrates from the right to the left of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal expansive views of distant, snow-covered mountain ranges under the night sky before the lantern's light casts long, flickering shadows across the pristine snow.
